Defendant William Lawson'S Demurrer To Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jessica Takano, Esq. 925-746-7770 for Plaintiff.
Nicholas Rogers, Esq. 925-838-2090 for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant requests if the Tentative ruling is affirmed that complaint not allege facts after June 2021 and new causes asserted. Plaintiff argues no substantive discussion for ruling, issue of capacity, cites Palm Spring case. The Court shares views on HOA fundamental problem/issue and asks Ms. Takano re: arbitration. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT WILLIAM RICHARD LAWSON'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Taken Under Submission.
